kill_fact: No kill_fact found. The bear/PASS thesis attacks the bull and every load-bearing bear figure independently verifies against the Q1 FY2026 8-K and SEC filings: GAAP operating LOSS of $12.99M (never GAAP-profitable), non-GAAP EPS -$0.07, gross margin DIPPED to GAAP 29.1% / non-GAAP 29.2% vs FY25 30.0% (so the 35%/40% targets remain unproven hockey sticks), Amazon warrant 7,945,399 shares @ $23.6954 (only 1.32M vested upfront, rest tied to up-to-$4B discretionary purchases — i.e. soft/contingent, not hard), datacenter +154% YoY = 54% of $151.1M (>70% concentrated in ~2 hyperscalers). At ~$162 / ~$13B cap on ~$507M TTM rev (~26x EV/sales) for a loss-making, sub-30%-GM, single-hyperscaler-concentrated commodity-transceiver vendor, the AI-scale-out optionality is already fully priced — the -19% move on a guide-RAISE confirms a saturated multiple. The PASS verdict survives the adversarial kill-check; the sop_fair_value is NOT built on a stale anchor (it uses the just-reported Q1 FY26 + raised >$1.1B FY26 guide).
corrections: NET-CASH OVERSTATED-AS-CONSERVATIVE: the debate cites net cash '~$195M' (dossier: cash $439.7M, debt $244.7M). The actual Q1 FY2026 8-K shows cash & equivalents $449.4M and debt of only ~$170.7M ($129.5M convertible senior notes + $41.2M current notes payable), i.e. net cash ~$278M — materially HIGHER (less debt) than the debate assumed. This STRENGTHENS the balance sheet relative to the thesis but does not change the verdict, since the PASS rests on valuation/quality (26x EV/sales, GAAP losses, ASP deflation, customer concentration, already-priced catalysts), not solvency. Also note the FY26 >$140M operating-income / 35% GM targets are management non-GAAP guide commentary, not disclosed in the 8-K text — keep them flagged as non-GAAP, H2-loaded, unverified-in-filing.
evidence: AAOI Q1 FY2026 8-K (reported 2026-05-07): total revenue $151.144M, datacenter $81.404M (+154% YoY, 54% of total), CATV $66.841M; GAAP gross margin 29.1% / non-GAAP 29.2%; GAAP operating loss $12.991M; non-GAAP EPS $(0.07); cash $449.377M; debt $129.5M converts + $41.2M current notes (net cash ~$278M); Q2'26 guide $180-198M rev, 29-30% non-GAAP GM (SEC EDGAR / StockTitan 8-K, 2026-05-07)

AAOI Transaction & Warrant Agreement with Amazon, 8-K dated 2026-03-13: warrant for up to 7,945,399 shares @ $23.6954, 1,324,233 vested at issuance, balance vesting on up-to-$4B discretionary Amazon purchases, exercisable through 2035-03-13 (SEC EDGAR, filed Mar 2025)
AAOI Microsoft supply agreement: 5-year initial term, auto-renew, design/manufacture/ship datacenter goods — confirmed in SEC 10-Q FY2025 (SEC EDGAR)
AAOI price ~$161.85 / market cap ~$13.0B on ~80.24M shares outstanding as of 2026-06-19 (stockanalysis.com / tradingeconomics, Jun 2026)
